home.title: Carnes Yak | Premium Meat Distributor in Mexico
home.description: Leaders in premium meat distribution in Mexico. We offer high-quality cuts with nationwide coverage in Culiacan, Durango, Hermosillo, and Mazatlan.
home.keywords: premium meat, meat distributor, meat cuts Mexico, Carnes Yak, Niku Alimentos

products.title: Product Catalog | Carnes Yak - Premium Cuts
products.description: Explore our full catalog of beef, pork, chicken, and fish. Premium cuts with nationwide distribution and guaranteed quality for your business or table.

contact.title: Contact | Carnes Yak
contact.description: Visit our branches in Culiacan, Durango, Hermosillo, and Mazatlan. Personalized service and premium meat distribution.

footer.description: Leading suppliers of premium cuts. Quality, freshness, and flavor guaranteed from the source to your table.

about.imageAlt: History and trajectory of Niku Alimentos
about.paragraph1: More than 10 years ago, Niku Alimentos was born with a very clear goal: to provide every client exactly what they need to grow their business. Since then, we have built a way of working based on closeness, service, and adaptability.
about.paragraph2: Over the years, we have brought together recognized meat product brands selected for their quality and prestige. Today we continue to evolve with an eye on the future while keeping our essence: quality, service, and real solutions.

features.qualityText: We carefully select products that meet the highest standards of hygiene and flavor.
features.distributionText: A strong distribution network ensures your product arrives on time and in perfect condition.
features.serviceText: We adapt to the specific needs of your business, providing tailor-made solutions.

coverage.lead: Leaders in meat distribution with presence across the entire Mexican Republic.
coverage.text: At Yak Alimentos, we bring the highest quality and freshness of our products to every corner of the country, ensuring your business has the support of punctual, efficient, and industry-leading logistics in every delivery.

steps.originText: We raise our own livestock under strict animal welfare standards and controlled feeding.
steps.processingText: In our facilities, every product goes through rigorous quality and hygiene controls.
steps.storageText: We keep more than 1,000 tons available at all times.
steps.deliveryText: Our delivery units have an advanced refrigeration system that ensures the product arrives in optimal condition.

contact.heading: Contact us
contact.lead: Write to us or visit one of our branches for personalized assistance.
